Log:
  sysutils/jail_exporter: create ports

  Jail Exporter is a Prometheus exporter for FreeBSD jail metrics as reported by
  rctl(8).

  WWW: https://github.com/phyber/jail_exporter

  PR:		238436
  Submitted by:	David O'Rourke <dor.bsd@xm0.uk>
